description: Contract awarded to TechCorp Solutions A.E. for annual server maintenance and cloud infrastructure support for the municipality's primary data center.
Major renovation of the central square, including paving, new lighting fixtures, and landscaping. Awarded to GreenBuild Constructions.
Procurement of 30 interactive whiteboards and projectors for local public schools.
Consulting services for the digital transformation strategy of the municipal citizen service centers (KEP).
Annual contract for waste management and street cleaning services in the northern suburbs.
High budget allocated for a basic website update; awarded to a company registered only 3 days prior.
Cybersecurity audit and implementation of new firewall rules for the municipal intranet.
Purchase of 5 electric garbage trucks to upgrade the municipality's fleet.
Printing of informational brochures and posters for the upcoming cultural festival.
Organization and setup of the annual Christmas village, including stage, lighting, and security.
